text.tspan: A user uploads a document image or file into cloud storage, which initiates the
The orchestration function sends the uploaded image to Computer Vision to analyze
The same orchestration function submits the document to Document Intelligence to
extract form fields, tables, and text.
The function combines extracted text and analysis results, then calls Language to
classify the document and create a summary.
The orchestration layer assembles all AI outputs into a normalized document record
and writes it to the operational data store.
The processed document content and metadata are pushed into Azure Cognitive Search
Azure Cognitive Search can also refresh or enrich its index from document records
Azure Functions sends telemetry about execution health, throughput, and failures to
Azure Monitor forwards collected metrics and logs into Log Analytics for
